_comment: Performance regression baseline for AfriSend API. Update this file after each intentional performance improvement or when SLOs are officially revised. The CI script compares live results against these values.

fx_quote_creation.description: POST /v1/fx/quote — generate a locked FX quote

kyc_session_create.description: POST /v1/kyc/sessions — create a new KYC session

global.description: Maximum acceptable HTTP error rate across all endpoints (excluding intentional 4xx)

peak_load.description: Target concurrency levels for production load simulation

regression_tolerances.description: CI will flag a regression if live results exceed baseline by these percentages
